raw_input: [auto-generated from playbook] Scale the winning UGC question hook pattern with fresh creative featuring authentic clinician morning routines that acknowledge documentation burden
value_proposition: Scale the winning UGC question hook pattern with fresh creative featuring authentic clinician morning routines that acknowledge documentation burden
pain_point: Clinicians spend more time on documentation than patient care and rarely leave work on time
desired_action: Click 'Learn more' to see how JotPsych works
tone_direction: Conversational, empathetic, first-person feeling like advice from a colleague. Avoid clinical jargon. Validate the pain without being salesy.
visual_direction: Real-feeling UGC video clips: clinician making morning coffee with subtle dread, sitting at desk with stacks of files, checking clock at 7pm in dark office. Slightly shaky phone camera, natural lighting, no perfect staging. Shoot vertically for mobile. 10-15 seconds max. Diverse clinicians in normal work attire. Warm earth tones in clothing and backgrounds. Question appears as text overlay in first 2 seconds.
key_phrases: How much time will you spend on notes today?
When was the last time you left work on time?
What would you do with 10 extra hours per week?
If you're like most clinicians, documentation takes up more of your day than patient care
JotPsych helps over 10,000 clinicians reclaim their time with AI-powered progress notes that feel natural, not robotic
